title: Junior SEO Specialist at Ecom Express

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Ecom Express
jsonLd.description:
Ecom Express invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Ludhiana location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ecom Express:
Ecom Express is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express!
